request.description:
### Description

This endpoint is used to register a new user account for the postpartum monitoring system.  
Authorization  
No authorization required.

### Request Body

- name (string, required): user full name.
    
- birth_date (string, required): delivery date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
    
- email (string, required): registered user email.
    
- password (string, required): minimum 8 characters.
    
- confirm_password (string, required): must match password.
    

### Response Status Code

- 201 Created: user registered successfully and tokens returned.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid request body, invalid birth date format, password mismatch, or email already registered.
    

### Test

- Register with valid data.
    
- Register with existing email.
    
- Register with invalid birth date format.
    
- Register with mismatched password confirmation.

### Description

This endpoint is used to authenticate a registered user and return access and refresh tokens.  
Authorization  
No authorization required.

### Request Body

- email (string, required): registered email.
    
- password (string, required): account password.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: login successful.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid request body.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: invalid email or password.
    

### Test

- Login with valid credentials.
    
- Login with wrong password.
    
- Login with unregistered email.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to generate a new access token and refresh token.
    
- Authorization  
    No authorization required.
    

### Request Body

- refresh_token (string, required): valid refresh token from login or register.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: token refreshed successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: refresh token is required.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: invalid or expired refresh token.
    

### Test

- Refresh with valid refresh token.
    
- Refresh with empty token.
    
- Refresh with expired token.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to revoke the current refresh token and log the user out.
    
- Authorization  
    No authorization required.
    

### Request Body

- refresh_token (string, required): refresh token to revoke.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: logout successful.
    
- 400 Bad Request: refresh token is required.
    

### Test

- Logout with valid refresh token.
    
- Logout without refresh token.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to retrieve the authenticated user profile.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: profile retrieved successfully.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Get profile with valid token.
    
- Get profile without token.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to update the authenticated user profile name.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- name (string, optional): updated user name.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: profile updated successfully.\]
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid request body or user not found.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token
    

### Test

- Update profile with valid name.
    
- Update profile with invalid body.
    
- Update profile without token.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to manually add a baby sleep session for today.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- start (string, required): start time in RFC3339 format.
    
- end (string, required): end time in RFC3339 format.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: sleep session added successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid request body, invalid time format, end before start, overlap, maximum sessions reached, or manual input not for today.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Add valid manual session for today.
    
- Add invalid time format.
    
- Add end time earlier than start.
    
- Add session for past day.

response.name: not for today

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to save backdated baby sleep sessions for a past date in a single submission.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- date (string, required): target date in YYYY-MM-DD.
    
- sessions (array, required): one or more sleep sessions for the selected date.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: bulk sleep sessions added successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid request body, invalid date, future/today date not allowed, data already exists, overlap, invalid time, or maximum sessions exceeded.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Save valid backdate sessions.
    
- Save backdate twice on same date.
    
- Save backdate for today.
    
- Save overlapping backdate sessions.

response.name: twice for the same date
backdate for today
overlapping

request.description:
### Description  

- This endpoint is used to retrieve baby sleep summary and session list for a selected date.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: daily sleep retrieved successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: missing date query or invalid date format.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Get daily sleep with valid date.
    
- Get daily sleep without date.
    
- Get daily sleep with invalid date format

### Description

- This endpoint is used to retrieve all saved baby sleep records for the authenticated user.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: sleep history retrieved successfully.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Get sleep history with valid token.
    
- Get sleep history without token.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to generate baby sleep and wake predictions based on the latest valid 3-day sleep history.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: sleep prediction generated successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: no data, not enough data, or last session not finished.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Request prediction with insufficient data.
    
- Request prediction with enough valid 3-day data.
    
- Request prediction when latest session is unfinished.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to show today's baby sleep insight based on current activity and prediction result.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response bnStatus Code

- 200 OK: insight retrieved successfully.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Insight when no sleep record exists today.
    
- Insight when baby is currently sleeping.
    
- Insight when baby is currently awake.
    
- Insight when prediction data is still insufficient.

response.name: success

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to start a baby sleep session for the current day.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: sleep session started.
    
- 400 Bad Request: baby already sleeping, maximum sessions reached, or overlap detected.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Start sleep when no active session exists.
    
- Start sleep when a session is already active.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to end the current active baby sleep session.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: sleep session ended.
    
- 400 Bad Request: no active sleep session.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- End active session successfully.
    
- End when no active session exists.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to check whether the baby is currently sleeping.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: status retrieved successfully.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Check status before start.
    
- Check status after start.

### Description

- This endpoint is used to create or update a daily symptom record and generate the latest alert result for that day.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- date (string, required): symptom date in YYYY-MM-DD.
    
- bleedings (array, required): bleeding records for the selected date.
    
- physical (object, required): physical condition data.
    
- moods (array, required): 1 to 3 selected moods.  
    

Response Status Code  

- 200 OK: symptom saved successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid request body, invalid date, invalid enum value, invalid scale value, future date, immutable backdate, or invalid stored birth date.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Save symptom for today.
    
- Update symptom on the same day.
    
- Save symptom for past date once.
    
- Save symptom on same past date again
    
- Save payload that should result in safe alert.
    
- Save payload that should result in warning alert.
    
- Save payload that should result in danger alert.

response.name: today (success)
pass date (success)
wrong scale

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to create or update a daily symptom record and generate the latest alert result for that day.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- date (string, required): symptom date in YYYY-MM-DD.
    
- bleedings (array, required): bleeding records for the selected date.
    
- physical (object, required): physical condition data.
    
- moods (array, required): 1 to 3 selected moods.  
    

Response Status Code  

- 200 OK: symptom saved successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid request body, invalid date, invalid enum value, invalid scale value, future date, immutable backdate, or invalid stored birth date.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Save symptom for today.
    
- Update symptom on the same day.
    
- Save symptom for past date once.
    
- Save symptom on same past date again
    
- Save payload that should result in safe alert.
    
- Save payload that should result in warning alert.
    
- Save payload that should result in danger alert.

response.name: update symptom (success)
update past day (error)
success
update same day

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to retrieve symptom history and the latest alert snapshot for each recorded day.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: symptom history retrieved successfully.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Get symptom history with valid token.
    
- Get symptom history without token.

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to retrieve symptom detail for a specific date.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: symptom detail retrieved successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid date format.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    
- 404 Not Found: symptom record not found.
    

### Test

- Get symptom detail with valid date.
    
- Get symptom detail with invalid date format.
    
- Get symptom detail for missing record.

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to retrieve the list of available psychologists.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: psychologist list retrieved successfully.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    

### Test

- Get psychologist list with valid token.
    
- Get psychologist list without token.

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to retrieve psychologist detail and available schedules.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- No request body.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: psychologist detail retrieved successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid psychologist id.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    
- 404 Not Found: psychologist not found.
    

### Test

- Get valid psychologist detail.
    
- Get psychologist detail with invalid id.
    
- Get psychologist detail for missing psychologist.

response.name: success

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to generate a WhatsApp booking template for the selected psychologist schedule.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- selected_slot (string, required): selected schedule label from psychologist detail.
    

### Response Status Code

- 200 OK: booking template generated successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid psychologist id, invalid request body, or unavailable schedule slot.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    
- 404 Not Found: psychologist not found.
    
- 500 Internal Server Error: WhatsApp admin number is not configured.
    

### Test

- Book psychologist with valid slot.
    
- Book psychologist with invalid slot.
    
- Book psychologist without token.

response.name: success
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "data": {

response.name: success

request.description:
### Description

- This endpoint is used to update the photo URL of a psychologist.
    
- Authorization  
    Bearer token required.
    

### Request Body

- photo_url (string, required): psychologist profile image URL.  
    

Response Status Code  

- 200 OK: photo updated successfully.
    
- 400 Bad Request: invalid psychologist id, invalid request body, or empty photo URL.
    
- 401 Unauthorized: missing or invalid token.
    
- 404 Not Found: psychologist not found.
    

### Test

- Update photo with valid URL.
    
- Update photo with empty URL.
    
- Update photo with invalid psychologist id.
